message:
feat(ui): add magnetic interactions, parallax orbits, and hero animation refinements

Enhance visual interactivity across three key components:

glow-orbits.tsx:
- Add mouse-driven parallax effect to orbital glow elements using
  GSAP, creating subtle depth as cursor moves across the viewport

hero.tsx:
- Add reusable Magnetic component for premium hover magnetism on
  interactive elements (spring-based with configurable strength)
- Upgrade hero heading to use staggered word-by-word reveal with
  clip-path animations instead of simple fade-in
- Enhance stat counters and CTA buttons with magnetic wrappers

project-card.tsx:
- Refine hover interactions and card layout for improved visual
  hierarchy and smoother transition states

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
